title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
